understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to get any pushable object, such as the selected piece or a block, to reach or exceed the target x-coordinate specified in the level, winning the scenario by achieving this before exhausting the step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece by one step (3 pixels) in the chosen direction; if a pushable object is adjacent, it may be pushed along with the piece. Walls can block movement, with potential differences in behavior for direct movement versus pushing objects against them, requiring observation to understand fully.

history.summary: Turn 1: MOVE_RIGHT | The block is adjacent to the right of the selected piece, so moving right will attempt to push it towards the target x=6, potentially achieving the goal in one step.
